creator: fenner@parc.xerox.com
text:
Masafumi NAKANE <max@FreeBSD.ORG> wrote:
>The update is applied.  Actually, the new master site submitted contained
>a typo and the subdirectory was incorrect.  So I changed it to
>ftp://ftp.netlib.org/fortran/

The original master site was OK; the failure noted by the distfile
survey was temporary.

Most of the other ports that use netlib have both netlib.bell-labs.com
and ftp.netlib.org in MASTER_SITES.

  Bill
